channel.title: Frontity Static Folder CDN Issue
channel.description:
Hello sir,
Good Morning!!
I am very happy with your team support.
When I test vercel website for speed performance, there is strongly recommended to use CDN which can improve website performance.
I have attached screenshot link (https://www.awesomescreenshot.com/image/17741115?key=4e31011fcd217366871b064117b5c2eb)
which all files i want to load from CDN, Can you guide me properly how i can configure CDN in Frontity for Static folder All Js render from CDN?
Otherwise what is your suggestion point of increase speed and score increase?
Kindly reply me as soon as possible.
Thank you, Pramod

item.title: Frontity Static Folder CDN Issue
item.dc:creator: pramod.r
item.description:
Hello sir,

Good Morning!!

I am very happy with your team support.

When I test vercel website for speed performance, there is strongly recommended to use CDN which can improve website performance.

I have attached screenshot link (Awesome Screenshot)

which all files i want to load from CDN, Can you guide me properly how i can configure CDN in Frontity for Static folder All Js render from CDN?

Otherwise what is your suggestion point of increase speed and score increase?

Kindly reply me as soon as possible.

Thank you,
Pramod

Read full topic
